chapter_description.p: The Debugger module in Nelson provides functions to inspect and analyze program execution.
It is designed to help users identify errors, trace the flow of execution, and better understand the state of variables during runtime.
Text editor support debugging features integrate with these functions to provide a seamless debugging experience.

keyword.name: dbcont
keyword.description: Resume execution from a paused breakpoint.

keyword.name: dbdown
keyword.description: Move down the call stack in debug mode.

keyword.name: dbstep
keyword.description: Execute next executable line during debugging.

keyword.name: dbup
keyword.description: Move up the call stack in debug mode.
